artPrompt: The dramatic moment a syndicate platter is offered: a shadowed goblin hand sliding a steaming tray of catered hors d'oeuvres across a back-room table toward grateful unseen guests, a small folded favor token tucked discreetly beneath the dish. A single amber lamp warms the glistening food while cigar smoke and menacing dark fill the room. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: No Such Thing as a Free Snack
text: Each opponent takes the table snack and is grateful. You create a Favor token for each opponent who took a snack. Enjoy it. We'll talk later.
flavorText: The syndicate caters every event in Whateverville. Free of charge. For now.
